name: tiktok-games-launcher
description: Launcher de TikTok Games para creadores
author: Carlos

scripts.pack: npm run compile && electron-packager . "TikTok Games Launcher" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist-electron --overwrite --ignore="(central-server|dist-electron|tsconfig.json|server.ts)"
scripts.dist: npm run compile && electron-packager . "TikTok Games Launcher" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist-electron --overwrite --ignore="(central-server|dist-electron|tsconfig.json|server.ts|config\.local\.json|scratch|temp_update|\.git)"
